guides-hierarchy-composition--docs.name: Docs
guides-hierarchy-composition--docs.title: Guides/Hierarchy & Composition
guides-hierarchy-composition--docs.content:
import { Meta } from "@storybook/addon-docs/blocks"; import { T } from "../stories/T"; #

--- ##

Tier
Tier 1
Foundations ()		 `AspectRatio`, `Box`, `Center`, `Code`, `Container`, `Divider`, `Flex`, `FocusTrap`, `Grid`, `Group`, `Heading`, `Highlight`, `Icon`, `Kbd`, `Loader`, `Markdown`, `Marquee`, `Paragraph`, `Portal`, `Quote`, `ScrollArea`, `SimpleGrid`, `Span`, `Stack`, `Transition`, `VisuallyHidden`
Tier 2
Atoms ()		 `Affix`, `Anchor`, `Audio`, `Avatar`, `BackTop`, `Badge`, `Button`, `Checkbox`, `Chip`, `ColorPicker`, `CopyButton`, `FieldError`, `Fieldset`, `FileUpload`, `FloatButton`, `IconButton`, `Image`, `Indicator`, `Input`, `InputMask`, `InteractiveArea`, `Label`, `Legend`, `Link`, `LinkButton`, `Notification`, `NumberInput`, `OtpInput`, `PasswordInput`, `PhoneInput`, `Progress`, `QRCode`, `Radio`, `Rating`, `ScrollProgress`, `SignaturePad`, `Skeleton`, `Slider`, `Spinner`, `Switch`, `Tag`, `Textarea`, `Tooltip`, `Video`
Tier 3
Molecules ()		 `Accordion`, `Alert`, `AvatarGroup`, `Banner`, `Breadcrumb`, `ButtonGroup`, `Card`, `Carousel`, `Cascader`, `CheckboxGroup`, `ColorInput`, `Combobox`, `DescriptionList`, `Dropdown`, `EmptyState`, `FAQSection`, `HoverCard`, `InputGroup`, `List`, `LoadingOverlay`, `Mentions`, `MultiSelect`, `Pagination`, `Popconfirm`, `Popover`, `RadioGroup`, `RangeSlider`, `Result`, `SearchInput`, `SegmentedControl`, `Selectbox`, `Snackbar`, `Stats`, `Stepper`, `SwitchGroup`, `Timeline`, `Toast`, `ToggleGroup`, `Transfer`
Tier 4
Organisms ()		 `AppShell`, `BentoGrid`, `BottomSheet`, `Calendar`, `Charts`, `ChatUI`, `CommandPalette`, `ContextMenu`, `DataGrid`, `DatePicker`, `DateRangePicker`, `Dialog`, `Drawer`, `Dropzone`, `ErrorBoundary`, `Footer`, `HamburgerMenu`, `Header`, `InfiniteScroll`, `Kanban`, `Masonry`, `Menu`, `Navbar`, `QueryBuilder`, `RichTextEditor`, `Sidebar`, `Splitter`, `TabBar`, `TabNavigation`, `Table`, `Tabs`, `TimePicker`, `Tour`, `TreeSelect`, `TreeView`, `VirtualList`, `Watermark`
--- ##

Tier Composition (Uses internally)
Tier 4 `DataGrid` `Table`, `Pagination`, `Checkbox`, `EmptyState`, `Spinner`, `SearchInput`
Tier 4 `AppShell` `Header`, `Sidebar`, `Footer`, `Drawer`, `HamburgerMenu`, `Button`
Tier 4 `ChatUI` `Avatar`, `Input`, `IconButton`, `ScrollArea`
Tier 4 `Calendar` `Button`, `Selectbox`
Tier 4 `Dialog` `Portal`, `FocusTrap`, `Transition`, `Icon` (Internal: *OverlayBase*)
Tier 4 `Drawer` `Portal`, `FocusTrap`, `Transition`, `Icon` (Internal: *OverlayBase*)
Tier 4 `DatePicker` `Popover`, `Calendar`, `Input`
Tier 4 `DateRangePicker` `Popover`, `Calendar`, `Input`
Tier 4 `Table` `Icon`, `Checkbox`
Tier 4 `Tabs` `Transition`
Tier 4 `Menu` `Popover`, `List`
Tier 4 `TreeView` `Icon` (Internal: *BaseListItem*)
Tier 4 `TimePicker` `Input` (type="time"), `Icon`
Tier 3 `Selectbox` `Transition`, `Icon` (Internal: *InputBase*, *FieldTemplate*, *BaseListItem*)
Tier 3 `Combobox` `Input` (Internal: *FieldTemplate*, *BaseListItem*)
Tier 3 `MultiSelect` `Chip`, `Icon` (Internal: *InputBase*, *FieldTemplate*, *BaseListItem*)
Tier 3 `Result` `InteractiveArea`, `Icon`
Tier 3 `EmptyState` `Icon`, `Button` (Internal: *StatusContent*)
Tier 3 `Accordion` `Icon`
Tier 3 `Stats` `Card`
Tier 3 `Carousel` `Button` (Arrows), `Indicator` (Dots)
Tier 3 `Pagination` `Button`, `Input`
Tier 3 `Breadcrumb` `Link`, `Icon`
Tier 3 `Popover` `Portal`, `Transition`
Tier 3 `Tooltip` `Popover`, `Portal`, `Transition`
Tier 3 `Stepper` `Icon`, `Divider`
Tier 4 `RichTextEditor` (Internal: *FieldTemplate*)
Tier 2 `PhoneInput` (Internal: *FieldTemplate*)
Tier 2 `IconButton` `Button`, `Icon`
Tier 2 `Indicator` `Icon` (Internal: *IndicatorBase*)
Tier 2 `Badge` (Internal: *IndicatorBase*)
Tier 2 `Notification` `Icon`, `IconButton` (Close)
--- ##
